description: Configure the studio 'Weather Wall' Chrome browser for live broadcasting according to the specification at ~/Desktop/weather_wall_config.txt. Create bookmark folders named 'Live Radar', 'Satellite Imaging', 'Forecast Models', and 'Off-Air', and sort the 26 existing bookmarks into them. In Site Settings, allow Location access for 'https://radar.weather.gov' and set global Notifications and Pop-ups to Block. Set the download directory to '~/Documents/Weather_Graphics' and enable instant saving. Create a site search with keyword 'metar' pointing to 'https://aviationweather.gov/data/metar/?id=%s'. Configure the browser to open 'https://radar.weather.gov/' and 'https://www.star.nesdis.noaa.gov/GOES/' on startup. Disable password saving and autofill features to prevent credential leaks on-air.
